heading: Importation or exportation of stolen motor vehicles, off-highway mobile equipment, vessels, or aircraft
label: 553 Importation or exportation of stolen motor vehicles, off-highway mobile equipment, vessels, or aircraft
notes: Amendments1994—Subsec. (c)(1). , substituted “” for “section 2 of the Motor Vehicle Information and Cost Savings Act”.Pub. L. 103–272, § 5(e)(5)(A)section 32101 of title 49Subsec. children.text: any motor vehicle, off-highway mobile equipment, vessel, aircraft, or part of any motor vehicle, off-highway mobile equipment, vessel, or aircraft, knowing the same to have been stolen; or

any motor vehicle or off-highway mobile equipment or part of any motor vehicle or off-highway mobile equipment, knowing that the identification number of such motor vehicle, equipment, or part has been removed, obliterated, tampered with, or altered;
is caused by collision or fire; or

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of a motor vehicle, is not a violation of (relating to altering or removing motor vehicle identification numbers); orsection 511 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of off-highway mobile equipment, would not be a violation of if such equipment were a motor vehicle.section 511 of this title
“motor vehicle” has the meaning given that term in ;section 32101 of title 49

“off-highway mobile equipment” means any self-propelled agricultural equipment, self-propelled construction equipment, and self-propelled special use equipment, used or designed for running on land but not on rail or highway;
“vessel” has the meaning given that term in section 401 of the Tariff Act of 1930 ();19 U.S.C. 1401
“aircraft” has the meaning given that term in ; andsection 40102(a) of title 49

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of a motor vehicle, has the meaning given that term in ; andsection 511 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of any other vehicle or equipment covered by this section, means a number or symbol assigned to the vehicle or equipment, or part thereof, by the manufacturer primarily for the purpose of identifying such vehicle, equipment, or part.
